suite.name: Crm

test.name: LogIn

kw.name: Begin Web Test
Open Browser
kw.msg: The msedgedriver version (138.0.3351.95) detected in PATH at C:\WebDriver\msedgedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected MicrosoftEdge version (144.0.3719.92); currently, msedgedriver 144.0.3719.92 is recommended for MicrosoftEdge 144.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

SessionNotCreatedException: Message: session not created: This version of Microsoft Edge WebDriver only supports Microsoft Edge version 138 Current browser version is 144.0.3719.92 with binary path C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#sessionnotcreatedexception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x0x7ff750c58c85+23461] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff750bacd70] GetHandleVerifier [0x0x7ff750ed0bb8+2611928] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509bb51d] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509ba8df] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509b67b1] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509b1045] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509f5a92] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509ea423] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509bea86] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509bdd11] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff7509be8b3] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff750abe6fd] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff750acba88] GetHandleVerifier [0x0x7ff750d38acb+940523] GetHandleVerifier [0x0x7ff750d41821+976705] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff750bba961] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff750bb3344] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff750bb3493] (No symbol) [0x0x7ff750ba4f36] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x0x7ff84a87e8d7+23] RtlUserThreadStart [0x0x7ff84ba4c53c+44]

test.name: Customer creation

kw.name: Begin Web Test
Open Browser
kw.msg: The msedgedriver version (138.0.3351.95) detected in PATH at C:\WebDriver\msedgedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected MicrosoftEdge version (144.0.3719.92); currently, msedgedriver 144.0.3719.92 is recommended for MicrosoftEdge 144.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

suite.doc: This is some basic info about the suite

errors.msg: The msedgedriver version (138.0.3351.95) detected in PATH at C:\WebDriver\msedgedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected MicrosoftEdge version (144.0.3719.92); currently, msedgedriver 144.0.3719.92 is recommended for MicrosoftEdge 144.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

The msedgedriver version (138.0.3351.95) detected in PATH at C:\WebDriver\msedgedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected MicrosoftEdge version (144.0.3719.92); currently, msedgedriver 144.0.3719.92 is recommended for MicrosoftEdge 144.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
